meta.title: GVG Portfolio Registry
meta.source: Updated master portfolio, ChatGPT project history and Drive-verified project records
meta.publicDataNotice: Public-compatible dataset. Internal cash balances, detailed cap tables, confidential Drive links and draft investment structures are excluded.
meta.changeSummary: Fixed project modal bug; externalized project data; added Guzo Charge EV charging venture.

showcase.headline: From organized ideas to governed implementation
showcase.subheadline: Green Value Group is building an Ethiopia-first portfolio of engineering services, technical talent, applied research and locally implemented products.

meta.editingModel: Public project information is maintained in data/projects.json. The app shell remains in index.html.

projects.name: Green Value Group
projects.summary: Green Value Group is building an Ethiopia-first venture platform that turns promising engineering, workforce, research and manufacturing initiatives into governed, fundable and measurable projects.
projects.nextDecision: Complete the first grant submissions, institutional meetings and partner-ready project data room, while moving the priority projects into funded pilot implementation.

assets.name: GVG visual identity and campaign assets

projects.currentMilestone: GVG has organized a 23-project portfolio, established a portfolio governance system, launched a public project showcase, selected two initial demonstrators and prepared an institutional and grant-submission pipeline.
projects.keyRisk: Portfolio growth must remain focused on a limited number of priority projects, supported by clear ownership, evidence, funding controls and delivery capacity.
projects.sourceTitle: Natan Ayele — Master Project Portfolio & Drive Index (2026)
projects.supportOutcome: Support at the GVG level strengthens the shared governance, fundraising, technology and operating infrastructure used by multiple high-impact projects.

projects.name: PavePath Design
projects.summary: PavePath Design is a civil engineering production-support studio helping U.S. engineering firms manage drafting, plan-production and technical workload through structured remote delivery.
projects.nextDecision: Secure the first recurring delivery partnership with a U.S. civil engineering firm, municipality-support consultant or property-infrastructure client.
supporterAsk: Civil engineering firms with overflow workload
projects.owner: Natan Ayele, Firaol and Beamlak Tamirat
projects.currentMilestone: Service packages, quality-control workflows, outreach systems, portfolio materials and the public PavePath platform are established and ready for recurring client delivery.
projects.keyRisk: The immediate focus is converting completed business-development assets into recurring work while maintaining strong technical review and reliable delivery capacity.
projects.supportOutcome: A recurring client engagement will validate the delivery model, create professional opportunities and support expansion of the production team.

projects.name: PavePath Technologies & Innovation Hub
projects.summary: PavePath Technologies is developing an Ethiopia-based innovation hub that combines local manufacturing, applied research, technical training and high-impact venture development in one shared implementation environment.
projects.nextDecision: Secure a suitable 750–1,000 m² workspace and establish the technical, institutional and equipment partnerships required to launch the first two demonstrators.

assets.name: Industrial workspace and investment facilitation application pack

projects.currentMilestone: The hub has selected Local Stethoscope Manufacturing and the PavePath EFVR Center as its first demonstrators, developed preliminary budgets, defined facility requirements and prepared a government-support application package.
projects.keyRisk: Implementation will proceed through phased workspace, equipment and prototype commitments linked to documented technical and market-validation milestones.
projects.sourceTitle: PavePath Technologies master concept, workspace strategy and Government Application Pack
projects.sourceStatus: Drive mapped; government application pack added
projects.supportOutcome: Support will establish shared manufacturing, laboratory and training capacity that can serve multiple projects, entrepreneurs and technical professionals.

projects.name: Kids Electric Motorsport Academy
projects.archetype: Youth motorsport, engineering and recreation platform
projects.summary: An Ethiopia-based youth motorsport and engineering platform combining locally assembled electric dirt cars, safe tracks, driver training, mechanical workshops, competitions and STEM education.
projects.nextDecision: Approve the first safe 24V prototype specification and a controlled academy pilot covering vehicle testing, track operations, safeguarding and instructor-led training.

assets.name: Kids ride-on electric dirt-car conversion specification
Motor Racing Chain Ethiopia community motorsport model
24V brushless drivetrain wiring and safety schematic
Academy safety, training, competition and workshop operating plan

projects.owner: GVG youth mobility initiative / PavePath Technologies
projects.currentMilestone: Resolve battery chemistry, single-versus-dual motor configuration, reverse switching, accessory load and prototype safety requirements.
projects.keyRisk: Child safety, battery fire risk, vehicle stability, track supervision and liability must be resolved before public use or competition.
projects.sourceTitle: Kids' Dirt Car / Ride-On Motorsport Build (2025-10-09) and Motor Racing Chain Ethiopia (2025-06-16)
projects.sourceStatus: ChatGPT history mapped; Google Drive source reconciliation required
projects.supportOutcome: Support will help this project complete its next measurable milestone through documented, project-specific collaboration.

projects.name: Guzo Charge
projects.sector: E-mobility, clean energy and charging infrastructure
projects.summary: Guzo Charge is a proposed Addis Ababa EV-charging venture combining charge-point operation, turnkey installation/EPC, locally assembled OpenEVSE-based AC chargers and an OCPP + Telebirr software layer.
projects.currentMilestone: A feasibility study, project proposal and investor one-pager have been prepared. The current verdict is conditional go as a service-first hybrid, not a hardware-manufacturing-first play.
projects.nextDecision: Validate customs/VAT treatment, charging tariff economics, certification timeline, EVCS licensing requirements and initial site partnerships before deploying seed capital.
projects.keyRisk: The venture must validate regulatory costs, tariff assumptions, FX exposure, licensing and certification before moving from documented opportunity to capital deployment.
supporterAsk: EV charging site hosts in Addis Ababa
Seed investors or strategic CPO partners
projects.supportOutcome: Support will move Guzo Charge from investment-grade documentation to a validated Phase 1 pilot with sites, permits, supplier pathway, localized software and first charging units.
projects.owner: Green Value Group / PavePath Technologies incubation
projects.sourceTitle: Guzo Charge feasibility study, project proposal and investor one-pager
projects.sourceStatus: Uploaded project documents added to public release

projects.name: PavePath Center for Energy, Frequency, Vibration & Resonance
projects.summary: An interdisciplinary center that converts energy, vibration, resonance, acoustic, electromagnetic and other measurable non-material interactions into validated knowledge, sensing technologies and practical engineering services.
projects.currentMilestone: Prepare a starter laboratory and first VibeSense field pilot with one prototype and three to five field nodes.
projects.nextDecision: Secure an institutional research partner, pilot site and costed equipment schedule for the initial applied-engineering program.
projects.keyRisk: Funding, scientific governance and institutional validation must precede expanded claims or major equipment commitments.
projects.sourceTitle: PavePath Center for Energy, Frequency, Vibration and Resonance

assets.name: PavePath EFVR Center master project plan
Center charter, research ethics and evidence-classification framework

projects.supportOutcome: Support will help this project complete its next measurable milestone through documented, project-specific collaboration.

projects.name: Local Stethoscope Manufacturing
projects.summary: Local production of affordable, research-validated, open-source acoustic stethoscopes using 3D printing and assembly in Addis Ababa.
projects.nextDecision: Assign the detailed technical workplan and validation partner before releasing prototype funds.
projects.currentMilestone: Prepare a 50-unit prototype and validation batch with a costed design, bill of materials, quality plan and testing pathway.
projects.keyRisk: Product quality, testing evidence, regulatory classification and product-liability controls must be resolved before pilot sales.
projects.sourceTitle: Feasibility Study and Stethoscope Manufacturing Project Proposal
projects.supportOutcome: Support will help this project complete its next measurable milestone through documented, project-specific collaboration.

projects.name: HAYL Smart Strength
projects.summary: An independent joint venture under PavePath Technologies developing a locally assembled, software-enabled smart strength system for gyms, hospitality and residential markets.
projects.currentMilestone: Complete Stage 0 demand, supplier, duty, foreign-exchange and intellectual-property validation before prototype investment.
projects.nextDecision: Confirm the joint-venture agreement, milestone-based contribution model and validated prototype gate.
projects.keyRisk: Forex access and component duty treatment are gate-zero conditions; failure would make the planned unit economics unreliable.
supporterAsk: Gym, hotel and residential pilot buyers

assets.name: Demand, duty, forex and supplier validation pack
HAYL S1 engineering and control-system specification

projects.supportOutcome: Support will help this project complete its next measurable milestone through documented, project-specific collaboration.

projects.name: Ereft Smart Wellness Chairs
projects.summary: An independent joint venture under PavePath Technologies developing locally assembled, software-differentiated smart wellness chairs for institutional and premium markets.
projects.currentMilestone: Complete founder/IP confirmation, supplier validation, prototype planning and institutional customer discovery.
projects.nextDecision: Finalize the joint-venture contribution model and release Phase 0 only after supplier, customs, foreign-exchange and customer gates are met.
projects.keyRisk: Foreign-exchange access is the binding constraint and scale must remain gated until at least six months of secure import capacity is demonstrated.
supporterAsk: Hotel, spa and clinic pilot customers
projects.sourceStatus: Drive-verified primary record; founder attribution correction pending
projects.confidence: Planning estimates pending RFQs and customs ruling

assets.name: Phase 0 prototype, software and supplier-validation plan
Body-scan, firmware rhythm and OTA service platform

projects.supportOutcome: Support will help this project complete its next measurable milestone through documented, project-specific collaboration.

projects.name: Etraincon
projects.summary: Etraincon is an assessment and technical learning platform preparing local and diaspora professionals for verified assignments, employer adoption and internationally relevant work standards.
projects.nextDecision: Place five verified learners into pilot assignments and secure the first institutional training or workforce-adoption partner.
projects.owner: Natan Ayele, Beamlak Tamirat and Bereket Tadesse
projects.currentMilestone: The first assessed learner cohort and the first complete technical course have been delivered, supported by structured intake, assessment, reviewer and learning-management workflows.
projects.keyRisk: The next stage depends on employers and institutions that can validate learner skills through real assignments, placements and measurable workforce outcomes.
projects.supportOutcome: Partner participation will convert completed training into employment evidence, employer confidence and a repeatable professional-development pathway.

projects.name: GIGChain
projects.summary: A QR and blockchain-enabled trust layer for Ethiopian coffee and other ethical products, connecting producers with verified buyers.
projects.nextDecision: Confirm one cooperative, one export partner and one end-to-end traceability pilot batch.
projects.owner: Natan Ayele, Beamlak Tamirat and Bereket Tadesse
projects.currentMilestone: Complete one traceable coffee lot from source through buyer verification.
projects.keyRisk: Traceability claims may exceed the quality of source data and partner verification.
projects.supportOutcome: Support will help this project complete its next measurable milestone through documented, project-specific collaboration.

projects.name: AbolTena Sustainable Coffee Platform
projects.summary: Coffee roasting at origin, producer empowerment, impact measurement and global brand development.
projects.nextDecision: Confirm a commercial partner and initial roasting-at-origin pilot volume.
projects.currentMilestone: Confirm the first roasting-at-origin commercial pilot.
projects.keyRisk: Unclear brand architecture and supply consistency across coffee initiatives.
projects.supportOutcome: Support will help this project complete its next measurable milestone through documented, project-specific collaboration.

projects.name: Ethiopian Goods Marketplace
projects.summary: An omnichannel marketplace for verified Ethiopian coffee, food, spices, textiles, leather goods and artisan products.
projects.nextDecision: Select one pilot product category and one diaspora target market.
projects.currentMilestone: Launch one product-category and one diaspora-market pilot.
projects.keyRisk: Launching too many categories before proving logistics and quality control.
projects.supportOutcome: Support will help this project complete its next measurable milestone through documented, project-specific collaboration.

projects.name: GVG Token & Governance
projects.summary: Permissioned participation, milestone escrow and controlled internal utility for GVG projects and stakeholders.
projects.nextDecision: Complete legal and compliance review before any external token deployment.
projects.currentMilestone: Complete legal, technical and custody review of the permissioned utility model.
projects.keyRisk: Regulatory, custody and governance complexity if the utility layer is deployed before legal review.
projects.sourceTitle: GVG Token Whitepaper and Smart Contract Architecture
projects.supportOutcome: Support will help this project complete its next measurable milestone through documented, project-specific collaboration.

projects.name: GVG Project Asset Organizer & Valuation
projects.summary: The portfolio registry that ingests project records and digital assets, maps relationships, scores readiness and preserves valuation history.
projects.nextDecision: Launch the supporter showcase, then migrate five pilot projects into a secure database.

assets.name: Unified Digital Asset Management System blueprint

projects.currentMilestone: Migrate five priority projects into a secure, auditable registry.
projects.keyRisk: A registry without clear ownership and review discipline can become another duplicate information store.
projects.supportOutcome: Support will help this project complete its next measurable milestone through documented, project-specific collaboration.

projects.name: GVG Capital Hub & Investment Facilitation
projects.summary: A curated investment-opportunity and facilitation platform connecting credible Ethiopian projects with diaspora and international capital.
projects.nextDecision: Validate the first five deal-screening and due-diligence workflows.
projects.currentMilestone: Validate five deal-screening and due-diligence workflows.
projects.keyRisk: Investment facilitation may require licenses, local legal partners and stronger diligence controls.
projects.supportOutcome: Support will help this project complete its next measurable milestone through documented, project-specific collaboration.

projects.name: GVG Remote Project Management
projects.summary: Structured local execution, evidence, reporting and remote control for diaspora-owned projects and businesses in Ethiopia.
projects.nextDecision: Complete the first-client proof case and publish the operating manual.
projects.currentMilestone: Publish the first-client proof case and operating evidence pack.
projects.keyRisk: Weak field evidence or procurement controls could damage diaspora client trust.
projects.sourceTitle: GVG RPM operating and marketing documentation
projects.supportOutcome: Support will help this project complete its next measurable milestone through documented, project-specific collaboration.

projects.name: Muday Marketing
projects.archetype: Marketing, branding and business development initiative
projects.summary: Muday Marketing is an active Green Value Group initiative providing marketing, branding and business development support across the portfolio while serving external clients and developing creative talent.
projects.nextDecision: Formalize service packages, campaign ownership and measurable business-development targets for each priority initiative.
projects.currentMilestone: Coordinate portfolio-wide brand, campaign and business-development support for priority GVG initiatives while strengthening Muday's own client and partnership pipeline.
projects.keyRisk: Clear service packages, campaign calendars and project-level owners must be maintained so portfolio support remains timely, measurable and commercially sustainable.
projects.sourceStatus: Website verified by portfolio owner; active GVG initiative
projects.supportOutcome: Support will expand the shared marketing and business-development capacity used to help GVG initiatives reach customers, institutions, partners and supporters.

projects.name: Community Crime Prevention Platform
projects.summary: A Telegram-integrated, credibility-based community reporting and incident-confirmation platform for Addis Ababa.
projects.nextDecision: Conduct a safeguarding, legal and false-reporting risk assessment.
projects.currentMilestone: Complete safeguarding, legal and false-reporting risk assessment.
projects.keyRisk: False reporting, privacy harm and unsafe escalation.
projects.supportOutcome: Support will help this project complete its next measurable milestone through documented, project-specific collaboration.

projects.name: Decentralized Public-Participation Design Platform
projects.summary: A prize-based collaborative platform for design submissions, public participation, expert review and transparent rewards.
projects.nextDecision: Select one public design challenge for a controlled proof of concept.
projects.currentMilestone: Run one controlled design challenge with expert moderation.
projects.keyRisk: Manipulated voting, unclear intellectual-property rights and weak challenge governance.
projects.supportOutcome: Support will help this project complete its next measurable milestone through documented, project-specific collaboration.

projects.name: Hybrid Collaborative Workstation
projects.summary: A physical-digital workstation enabling remote collaborators to work side by side through virtual windows and shared screens.
projects.nextDecision: Convert the concept into an industrial-design brief and low-fidelity prototype.
projects.currentMilestone: Complete an industrial-design brief and low-fidelity prototype.
projects.keyRisk: High prototyping cost before user need and manufacturability are validated.
projects.supportOutcome: Support will help this project complete its next measurable milestone through documented, project-specific collaboration.

projects.name: Food & Agriculture Supply-Chain Modernization
projects.summary: Processing, packaging, storage, cold-chain, transport, branding and export-readiness opportunities for Ethiopian products.
projects.nextDecision: Select one investable value-chain pilot with a measurable bottleneck.
projects.currentMilestone: Select one investable supply-chain bottleneck and implementation partner.
projects.keyRisk: Opportunity breadth may prevent selection of a commercially executable first value chain.
projects.supportOutcome: Support will help this project complete its next measurable milestone through documented, project-specific collaboration.

projects.name: Legacy Coffee Ventures
projects.summary: CupConnect, Afro Coffee and Siyi Roasting concepts preserved as commercial history and inputs to current coffee initiatives.
projects.nextDecision: Archive unique source material and map reusable relationships to AbolTena and GIGChain.
projects.currentMilestone: Archive unique source material and map reusable assets to active ventures.
projects.keyRisk: Legacy records may be duplicated or confused with active coffee brands.
projects.supportOutcome: Support will help this project complete its next measurable milestone through documented, project-specific collaboration.

projects.name: Bitcoin Mining and Cryptocurrency Research
projects.summary: Earlier research on mining operations, cryptocurrency creation, automation and token architecture that informed later governance work.
projects.nextDecision: Archive the research and retain only reusable technical learning.
projects.currentMilestone: Archive obsolete material and retain only reusable technical learning.
projects.keyRisk: Legacy research may be mistaken for current token policy or active operations.
